rows.source_ref: KGMK, "Range Between Tokoyo/London on 1m [33% Combined Profit, 70% Winning Rate, Majors]", BabyPips forum, 2025, https://forums.babypips.com/t/range-between-tokoyo-london-on-1m-33-combined-profit-70-winning-rate-majors/1282228
rows.concept: An intraday session-range edge on M1 FX majors/crosses traded across the Tokyo-to-London transition window, with long/short entries tagged by four session rules.
rows.eligibility_reason: Results-dump only: the four entry/exit 'Rules' are referenced by number but never defined; no methodology, thresholds, or parameters stated, so the strategy cannot be implemented as written.
rows.notes: Concept (session-structure range on M1 majors during Tokyo/London window) fits our favored uncorrelated-driver bucket, but is un-harvestable as posted. Single-post thread marked COMPLETE (no follow-up rules). ~30-day forward-test sample (Apr 2025) on EURUSD/GBPUSD/USDCHF/USDJPY/USDCAD/AUDUSD + AUD/EUR/CHF/JPY crosses; claimed 33% combined / 70% win, but the table includes several large 'END OF DAY' losing exits (e.g. AUDUSD -2.66, USDCHF -2.07). Referenced images (screenshots) may hold the rules but are image-only; no OCR attempted. Session value approximate (Tokyo-to-London transition; exact boundaries not stated).
